chart.title: Greenhouse gas emissions per 100 grams of protein
chart.subtitle: Greenhouse gas emissions are measured in kilograms of carbon dioxide-equivalents.

GHG emissions per 100g protein (Poore &.descriptionShort: Global average greenhouse gas emissions (GHG) per 100 grams of protein across different food products. This is measured in kilograms of CO₂-equivalents per 100 grams of protein (kgCO₂eq per 100g protein).
